summary: L121 secondary variants are useful stress probes but high-risk for score contamination because all 16 carry ordinary_edd_candidate=true and EDD in metric_routes. They should stay diagnostic-only, subtotaled separately, and blocked from promotion until exclusions and guards exist.

accepted_fields_or_changes: Label all secondary variants as diagnostic_only secondary_stress_probe.
Keep persona/usefulness transfer and sparse technical not-found probes in separate subtotals.
Use L121 resolved primary only for cheap smoke and multiturn primary for memory claims.
rejected_or_risky_items: Do not let secondary variants enter ordinary EDD, champion ranking, headline graphs, or main cohort denominators.
Do not count duplicated source_case_id rows as independent performance cases.
Do not promote persona usefulness rows without manual evidence-fit review.
needs_orchestrator_review: Add or verify registry labels before any L122 answer execution.
Add an aggregator smoke check proving secondary_variant rows cannot enter the scoreboard.
Decide whether to patch ordinary_edd_candidate=false or enforce exclusion at registry/aggregator level.

blocking_reason: Secondary variants should not be promoted or scored as performance evidence until diagnostic-only exclusions and sparse-field guards are enforced.

observed_results: All 16 secondary variants have expect_abstention=false, ordinary_edd_candidate=true, and EDD in metric_routes.
No files were modified by the worker.
